main.description: Reference to a project. Identified by a handle and enriched with optional human-friendly metadata, links and visuals.

displayName.description: Display name of the project as shown in user interfaces.

href.description: Primary external URL for the project (e.g. project homepage).

banner.description: Banner image used as the project's cover. Less than 1MB in size.

avatar.description: Avatar image representing the project. Less than 1MB in size.
